name: Poppyseed Cookies
recipeInstructions:
PREHEAT OVEN TO 350°F WITH RACK IN MIDDLE.
Combine butter, sugar and salt in an electric mixer fitted with a paddle. Beat at medium speed until creamy. Add eggs and poppyseed paste; beat until incorporated. Reduce speed to slow and add flour gradually. Mix until smooth. Using two soup spoons, drop tablespoon-sized dollops of batter onto a lightly greased or non-stick cookie sheet, about 1-inch apart. Bake for 15 minutes or until edges are light golden brown. Remove from oven and let cool completely on the baking sheet before dusting with powdered sugar.
